Freshness Guarantee for Online Orders:

Also known as "Chamoe", these melons are easily identified with its yellow skin and white stripes. They are not as sweet as the other melons and are best eaten when slightly chilled.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Peel off the skin
2. Slice the melon into half
3. Scrape off the seeds with a spoon
4. Cut into bite sized pieces
5. Enjoy the white delicious fruit
metaData.Storage Information:
• To maintain its optimum quality for longer, store the item(s) whole in the fridge to keep it chilled
• Best consumed within 3 days of delivery

product.name: CJ Bibigo Crispy Seaweed Snack - Korean BBQ

metaData.Preparation:
• Preparing noodle:
1. Boil water and put CJ Sweet Potato Noodle (100g) in the boiling water for 8 minutes
2. Take out the boiled noodle and drain water from the noodle
3. Rinse in the cold water in order to make for more elastic taste
• Preparing dish:
1. Wash and rinse all vegetables
2. Chop & slice it to preferred size
3. Heat frying pan with oil
4. Stir fry pork and garlic
5. Put in CJ Sweet potato noodle
6. Put in all vegetables and sesame oil in pan
7. Put CJ BBQ Sauce 60g (Original: Soy sauce base, others: Chili base)
8. Stir fry for 3 minutes
9. Serve on plate and put some sesame seeds on the top of dish
10. Ready to eat

metaData.Preparation:
1. Put vermicelli in boiling water for about 5 to 7 minutes
2. When vermicelli are cooked, drain away the water
3. Fry ingredients of your choice eg. meat, seafood, vegetables, etc in hot pan then add vermicelli and fry evenly
4. Season to taste and serve
